svg.text: csp_lib.integration · Data Flow · GridControlLoop · SystemController · Alarm Handling · Heartbeat
Devices → Registry → ContextBuilder → StrategyExecutor → ProtectionGuard → CommandRouter → Devices
NOT included: ModeManager, ProtectionGuard, HeartbeatService, Alarm handling
3. Alarm Handling Modes — system_wide vs per_device
SystemControllerConfig.alarm_mode determines how device alarms affect control
Any device alarm → entire system auto-stops
1. Register "__auto_stop__" mode with StopStrategy at priority PROTECTION+1 (=101)
3. Highest priority override → effective_strategy = StopStrategy → Command(0, 0)
Only affected device is skipped; system continues operating
Periodic value writes to prove controller liveness; pause/resume linked to suppress_heartbeat
INCREMENT — counts up, wraps at max
